debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in 0..Real.pi, sin x * f (cos x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in -1..1, f y

failed_attempts:
rw [← integral_neg, ← neg_mul, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv]
  · simp
  · exact fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x
  · exact continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn

rw [← cos_zero, ← cos_pi, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.intervalContinuous π 0]
  simp [integral_symm, mul_comm]

rw [integral_of_le pi_pos.le, integral_of_le (by norm_num : (-1 : ℝ) ≤ 1), ← image_cos_Icc]
  rw [integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul measurableSet_Icc (λ x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) strictAntiOn_cos.injOn f]
  refine integral_congr_ae (ae_restrict_of_forall (λ x hx ↦ ?_))
  simp [abs_sin_of_nonneg hx.1 hx.2]

have : ∫ y in -1..1, f y = ∫ y in cos π..cos 0, f y := by simp
  rw [this, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x)
    continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn]
  simp [integral_symm]
rw [← integral_sin_mul_f_cos f (by sorry) 0 π]; simp

simpa [cos_zero, cos_pi] using intervalIntegral.integral_comp_mul_deriv
    (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn f (a := 0) (b := π)

rw [← cos_zero, ← cos_pi, ← integral_neg, ← integral_comp_deriv_smul (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn]
  simp [integral_symm]

rw [← integral_comp_deriv_smul_antitone pi_pos.le (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) antitoneOn_cos]
  simp

have hg : ∀ x ∈ [[0, π]], HasDerivAt cos (-sin x) x := fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x
  have hg' : ContinuousOn (fun x => -sin x) [[0, π]] := (continuous_sin.neg).continuousOn
  rw [← integral_neg, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv_iff hg hg']
  · simp [cos_pi, cos_zero]
  · sorry

rw [integral_of_le pi_pos.le, integral_of_le (by linarith : (-1 : ℝ) ≤ 1)]
  rw [← integral_Icc_eq_integral_Ioc, ← integral_Icc_eq_integral_Ioc]
  rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul measurableSet_Icc (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) (Or.inr antitoneOn_cos), image_cos_Icc]
  apply set_integral_congr measurableSet_Icc
  intro x hx
  rw [abs_neg, abs_eq_self.mpr (sin_nonneg_of_mem_Icc hx)]

rw [← integral_symm, ← cos_zero, ← cos_pi, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) (continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn)]
  simp [mul_comm]
exact integral_sin_smul_f_cos f (by sorry) 0 π

rw [← cos_pi, ← cos_zero, integral_symm, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn]
  simp [deriv_cos, integral_neg]

rw [← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) (by continuity) (by sorry)]
  simp

have h := integral_comp_mul_deriv_of_monotone (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x)
    (by continuity) (Or.inr (by simpa using antitoneOn_cos_0_pi))
  simp [h, integral_symm]

have : ∫ x in 0..π, sin x * f (cos x) = - ∫ x in 0..π, -sin x * f (cos x) := by rw [integral_neg, neg_neg]
  rw [this, integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn,
    cos_zero, cos_pi, integral_symm, neg_neg]

rw [← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn (by sorry)]
  simp [neg_integral_flip]

rw [integral_of_le Real.pi_pos.le, integral_of_le (by norm_num : (-1 : ℝ) ≤ 1), ← cos_image_Icc,
    integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul measurableSet_Icc
    (fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_cos x).hasDerivWithinAt) (Or.inr antitoneOn_cos) f]
  exact set_integral_congr measurableSet_Icc (fun x hx ↦ by
    rw [abs_neg, abs_of_nonneg (sin_nonneg_on_Icc hx), mul_comm])

rw [integral_of_le pi_pos.le, integral_of_le (by linarith), ← cos_image_Icc,
    integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul measurableSet_Icc (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) strictAntiOn_cos.injOn]
  simp [sin_nonneg_of_mem_Icc, abs_of_nonneg]

have : ∫ y in -1..1, f y = ∫ y in (if cos 0 ≤ cos π then cos 0..cos π else cos π..cos 0), f y := by
    simp [cos_pi, cos_zero]
  rw [this, ← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul pi_pos.le (λ x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) injOn_cos continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn]
  apply integral_congr
  intro x hx
  simp [abs_sin_of_nonneg (sin_nonneg_of_mem_Icc hx)]

rw [← integral_symm, ← cos_zero, ← cos_pi, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) (by continuity)]
  simp

have h := integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) (by continuity)
  simp [← h, integral_symm]

have h := integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn
  simpa [integral_symm, integral_neg, cos_zero, cos_pi] using h

have h := (integral_comp_mul_deriv_iff (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x)
    continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn).2
  simp [← h, cos_pi]

rw [← integral_neg, ← cos_pi, ← cos_zero, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn]
  simp [mul_comm]

have h : ∫ x in 0..π, f (cos x) * -sin x = ∫ y in 1..-1, f y := by
    simpa using integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn
  simp [← h, integral_neg, mul_comm, integral_symm 1 (-1)]
rw [integral_sin_mul_f_cos, cos_pi, cos_zero]

rw [← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) (by continuity) (a := π) (b := 0)]
  simp [integral_symm]

rw [← cos_pi, ← cos_zero, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (fun x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) (by continuity)]
  simp [integral_symm, mul_comm]

have : ∫ x in 0..π, sin x * f (cos x) = - ∫ x in 0..π, -sin x * f (cos x) := by simp
  rw [this, integral_comp_mul_deriv_of_monotone_on (fun x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) (by continuity) (.inr (by simpa using antitoneOn_cos_0_pi))]
  simp

have h := integral_comp_mul_deriv (λ x _ ↦ hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn (a := 0) (b := π)
  simpa [integral_symm, neg_mul, smul_eq_mul] using h

rw [← integral_symm, ← cos_zero, ← cos_pi, ← integral_comp_mul_deriv (λ x _ => hasDerivAt_cos x) continuous_sin.neg.continuousOn]
  simp
